formulas.name: Area between a curve and x-axis
formulas.variables: A = area, f(x) = function, a and b = limits of integration

formulas.name: Area between a curve and y-axis
formulas.variables: A = area, f(y) = function, a and b = limits of integration
formulas.notes: For finding area to the left of curves

formulas.name: Volume of solid of revolution (disk method)
formulas.variables: V = volume, f(x) = function, a and b = limits of integration

formulas.name: Volume of solid of revolution (shell method)
formulas.variables: V = volume, f(x) = function, a and b = limits of integration

formulas.name: Surface area of solid of revolution
formulas.variables: S = surface area, f(x) = function, f'(x) = derivative, a and b = limits of integration
formulas.notes: For finding surface area of solids of revolution

formulas.name: Area of region bounded by two curves
formulas.variables: A = area, f(x) and g(x) = functions, a and b = limits of integration
formulas.notes: For finding area between two curves

formulas.name: Volume of solid with known cross-section
formulas.variables: V = volume, A(x) = cross-sectional area, a and b = limits of integration
formulas.notes: For finding volume of solids with known cross-sections

formulas.name: Length of a curve
formulas.variables: L = length, f(x) = function, f'(x) = derivative, a and b = limits of integration

formulas.name: Curvature of a curve
formulas.variables: K = curvature, f(x) = function, f'(x) and f''(x) = derivatives

formulas.name: Volume of solid with washer method
formulas.variables: V = volume, f(x) and g(x) = functions, a and b = limits of integration
formulas.notes: For finding volume of solids using washer method
